title: elaphoglossum lanatum
intro: Elaphoglossum lanatum, also known as the hairy Elaphoglossum fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum lanatum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds, fever, and skin conditions. Elaphoglossum lanatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
